title: Update Author Information in README.md
description: Locate and update the author's name or attribution details in the project's primary documentation file (README.md) to ensure project metadata is accurate and up-to-date.
details: Open the README.md file in the project root directory and identify the section containing author information. This could be in a dedicated 'Author' section, within project metadata, or in the header/footer of the document. Replace the existing author name with the updated information, ensuring proper formatting and consistency with the existing documentation style. Maintain any existing formatting such as links, email addresses, or social media handles if they need to be updated as well.
test_strategy: Manual review of the README.md file after changes to verify the author name is correctly updated, properly formatted, and no markdown syntax errors were introduced. Check that the file renders correctly when viewed on the repository hosting platform.

title: Update Author Field in package.json
description: Check and update the author field in package.json to maintain consistency across project metadata files.
details: Open the package.json file and locate the 'author' field. Update it with the same author information used in the README.md to ensure consistency across all project metadata. The author field in package.json typically follows the format 'Name <email> (website)' or can be an object with name, email, and url properties. Follow the existing format in the file.
test_strategy: Verify that the package.json file remains valid JSON after the change by running 'npm install' or using a JSON validator. Ensure the author field follows the correct npm package.json specification format.

title: Verify Author Consistency Across Project Files
description: Perform a repository-wide search to identify and update any other instances of the old author name to ensure complete consistency across all project documentation and metadata files.
details: Use repository search functionality (grep, IDE search, or GitHub search) to find all instances of the old author name across the entire codebase. Check common locations such as LICENSE file, CONTRIBUTING.md, code comments with author tags, and any other documentation files. Update any found instances to maintain consistency. Pay special attention to copyright notices in LICENSE files and any @author tags in code comments.
test_strategy: Perform a final repository-wide search for the old author name to confirm no instances remain. Review all modified files to ensure the new author information is correctly formatted and contextually appropriate in each location.
